claim_policy: Table 1 is a SOTA landscape/protocol table. It may describe published scope and reported signals, but it must not claim MEF has reproduced or outperformed an external method until official weights/executables and measured outputs are configured.

rows.mef_alignment_action: Need external CDS-only CAI/MFE/wall-clock run; local codon-lattice DP is proxy only.
rows.metric_family: Not an accuracy/F1 task; optimize folding/codon objective.
rows.reported_signal: Strong experimental validation; SARS-CoV-2 spike design reported about 11 min runtime and high antibody titer gains.
rows.speed_or_scale: Dynamic-programming CDS optimizer; strong deterministic baseline.

rows.mef_alignment_action: Need external CDS-only CAI/MFE/wall-clock run; local codon-lattice DP is proxy only.
rows.reported_signal: Probabilistic lattice parsing over synonymous codons.
rows.speed_or_scale: External lattice parser; runtime benchmark pending.

rows.mef_alignment_action: Need leakage-audited frozen embeddings or official checkpoints under matched trainable budget.
rows.metric_family: Task dependent; compare frozen-probe accuracy/F1 on mRNABench-style tasks.
rows.reported_signal: Segment-integrated small language model trained on millions of mRNAs.

rows.mef_alignment_action: Need CDS/protein-conditioned generation comparison with protein identity and CAI/GC metrics.
rows.metric_family: Generative/RL task; use reward, validity and protein-preservation metrics.
rows.reported_signal: Trained on 338,417 mRNAs and optimized expression, stability and GC rewards.
rows.scope: codon-level generative LM plus RL for CDS design
rows.speed_or_scale: Scalable codon LM; exact local throughput pending.

rows.mef_alignment_action: Need head-to-head full-length T1-T7 with TE delta and hard-constraint satisfaction.
rows.metric_family: Generation task; report wet-lab/oracle protein output, CAI, MFE, rare-codon, and TE proxy.
rows.reported_signal: Wet-lab validated: up to ~41x protein and ~128x antibody response vs codon optimization; circRNA ~121x in vivo. CDS beats CAI/GC baselines; 5'UTRs rival BNT162b2.
rows.scope: de novo full-length mRNA design (encoder-decoder CDS + decoder-only UTR, then combined)
rows.speed_or_scale: Zero-shot autoregressive decoders; modular per-region generation.

rows.mef_alignment_action: Need head-to-head full-length T1-T7 with TE delta and hard-constraint satisfaction.
rows.metric_family: Generation task; report predicted TE/half-life, diversity, cross-region interaction gain, protein preservation.
rows.reported_signal: Pretrained on 10M full-length natural mRNAs across species; iterative oracle-reward optimization; reports higher predicted translation rate than LinearDesign and GEMORNA plus higher full-length diversity.
rows.speed_or_scale: Decoder-only LM; flexible single-region / full-length / conditional generation modes.

rows.mef_alignment_action: Need shared held-out protein Pareto frontier for TE/half-life/objectives.
rows.metric_family: Multi-objective generation; report per-objective Pareto frontier (TE, half-life, immune-safety) and protein-conditioned validity.
rows.reported_signal: Pretrained on 6M protein-mRNA pairs; MO-GRPO standardizes per-metric advantages before aggregation; improves in-silico Pareto frontier of predicted half-life vs TE on held-out luciferase.
rows.scope: protein-conditioned de novo full-length mRNA via multi-objective RL (BART encoder-decoder + MO-GRPO)
rows.speed_or_scale: GRPO RL over protein prompts; no wild-type template needed at inference.

rows.mef_alignment_action: Need shared 5'UTR/property optimization trajectory and success-rate protocol.
rows.metric_family: Optimization task; report property gain, success rate, on-manifold biological plausibility, and interpolation smoothness.
rows.reported_signal: Across 3 real mRNA datasets (2 orders of magnitude in size, incl. zebrafish 5'UTR); up to +148% median property gain and +30% success rate while staying on the viable manifold; interpretable latent trajectories; robust with as few as ~2000 points.
rows.scope: property-guided optimization + interpolation of existing mRNAs via manifold Langevin dynamics (organized autoencoder + manifold projector)
rows.speed_or_scale: Latent Langevin dynamics; efficient inference, no explicit score/density learning.

rows.mef_alignment_action: Need leakage-audited frozen embeddings or official checkpoints under matched trainable budget.
rows.metric_family: Task dependent; compare property-prediction accuracy/F1 after frozen probing.
rows.reported_signal: Open codon-aware models announced at 80M, 600M and 1B parameter scales.
rows.speed_or_scale: Large RefSeq-scale pretraining; embedding-cache runtime pending.

rows.mef_alignment_action: Need UTR-only T5/T7 baseline while MEF preserves CDS/3'UTR constraints.
rows.metric_family: Predictor/generator task; use TE proxy and held-out predictor agreement.

rows.mef_alignment_action: Need leakage-audited frozen embeddings or official checkpoints under matched trainable budget.
rows.metric_family: Task dependent; compare frozen-probe accuracy/F1 and generation-head transfer.
rows.reported_signal: Hybrid long-context model for full-sequence mRNA therapeutics.
rows.speed_or_scale: Long-context embedding cache needed for fair runtime.

rows.mef_alignment_action: Need CDS/protein-conditioned generation comparison with protein identity and CAI/GC metrics.
rows.metric_family: Use codon accuracy, codon-usage profile and protein-preservation metrics.
rows.reported_signal: Codon-level generation claims for protein-conditioned coding sequence design.
